cookieConsent.title: Cookie consent
cookieConsent.message: We use analytics to improve the site (IP, location, device). By accepting you agree to our

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.analyticsBody: We collect anonymous usage data to improve the service. This includes:
privacy.analyticsIp: IP address (used to infer country/region only)
privacy.cookiesBody: We use a cookie to remember your analytics consent (accept or decline). No tracking runs until you accept.
privacy.storageBody: Analytics data is stored in memory (Redis) only, not in a permanent database. Aggregated stats are used for product improvement and are not sold to third parties.
privacy.choicesBody: You can accept or decline analytics when prompted. You can change your choice by clearing cookies or visiting this page.
